sEn: Qwen3-VL achieves state-of-the-art multimodal performance with native 256K-token context, dense and MoE variants, and key architectural innovations including interleaved-MRoPE, DeepStack, and text-based time alignment.
sZh: Qwen3-VL 实现了最先进的多模态性能，原生支持 256K token 上下文，提供密集和 MoE 变体，并引入了包括交错 MRoPE、DeepStack 和基于文本的时间对齐等关键架构创新。
absEn: We introduce Qwen3-VL, the most capable vision-language model in the Qwen series to date, achieving superior performance across a broad range of multimodal benchmarks. It natively supports interleaved contexts of up to 256K tokens, seamlessly integrating text, images, and video. The model family includes both dense (2B/4B/8B/32B) and mixture-of-experts (30B-A3B/235B-A22B) variants to accommodate diverse latency-quality trade-offs. Qwen3-VL delivers three core pillars: (i) markedly stronger pure-text understanding, surpassing comparable text-only backbones in several cases; (ii) robust long-context comprehension with a native 256K-token window for both text and interleaved multimodal inputs, enabling faithful retention, retrieval, and cross-referencing across long documents and videos; and (iii) advanced multimodal reasoning across single-image, multi-image, and video tasks, demonstrating leading performance on comprehensive evaluations such as MMMU and visual-math benchmarks (e.g., MathVista and MathVision). Architecturally, we introduce three key upgrades: (i) an enhanced interleaved-MRoPE for stronger spatial-temporal modeling across images and video; (ii) DeepStack integration, which effectively leverages multi-level ViT features to tighten vision-language alignment; and (iii) text-based time alignment for video, evolving from T-RoPE to explicit textual timestamp alignment for more precise temporal grounding. Under comparable token budgets and latency constraints, Qwen3-VL achieves superior performance in both dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures. We envision Qwen3-VL serving as a foundational engine for image-grounded reasoning, agentic decision-making, and multimodal code intelligence in real-world workflows.
absZh: 我们介绍了 Qwen3-VL，这是 Qwen 系列中目前最强大的视觉语言模型，在广泛的多模态基准测试中均表现出卓越性能。它原生支持高达 256K token 的交错上下文，无缝集成文本、图像和视频。模型系列包括密集（2B/4B/8B/32B）和混合专家（30B-A3B/235B-A22B）变体，以适应不同的延迟-质量权衡。Qwen3-VL 提供三大核心支柱：（i）显著更强的纯文本理解，在多种情况下超越可比的纯文本骨干网络；（ii）强大的长上下文理解能力，原生 256K token 窗口支持文本和交错多模态输入，能够忠实保留、检索和交叉引用长文档和视频；（iii）在单图像、多图像和视频任务中展现先进的多模态推理能力，在 MMMU 和视觉数学基准（如 MathVista 和 MathVision）等综合评估中表现领先。在架构上，我们引入了三项关键升级：（i）增强的交错 MRoPE，用于跨图像和视频的更强时空建模；（ii）DeepStack 集成，有效利用多级 ViT 特征以加强视觉-语言对齐；（iii）基于文本的视频时间对齐，从 T-RoPE 演进为显式文本时间戳对齐，实现更精确的时间定位。在可比的 token 预算和延迟约束下，Qwen3-VL 在密集和混合专家（MoE）架构中均实现了卓越性能。我们期望 Qwen3-VL 作为图像基础推理、智能体决策和多模态代码智能的基础引擎，服务于实际工作流程。

contrib.en: Native 256K-token context window for interleaved text, images, and video.
contrib.zh: 原生支持文本、图像和视频交织的 256K token 上下文窗口。

contrib.en: Enhanced interleaved-MRoPE for stronger spatial-temporal modeling.
contrib.zh: 增强的交织 MRoPE 实现更强的时空建模。

contrib.en: DeepStack integration leveraging multi-level ViT features for tighter vision-language alignment.
contrib.zh: 集成 DeepStack，利用多级 ViT 特征增强视觉-语言对齐。

contrib.en: Text-based time alignment for video, evolving from T-RoPE to explicit textual timestamps.
contrib.zh: 基于文本的视频时间对齐，从 T-RoPE 演进为显式文本时间戳。

contrib.en: Superior multimodal reasoning on MMMU and visual-math benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在 MMMU 和视觉数学基准上领先的多模态推理能力。

contrib.en: Dense and MoE variants (2B to 235B) for flexible latency-quality trade-offs.
contrib.zh: 密集和 MoE 变体（2B 到 235B）支持灵活的延迟-质量权衡。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to English and Chinese multimodal benchmarks.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于英文和中文多模态基准。

limits.en: No analysis of failure cases or bias in long-context retrieval.
limits.zh: 未分析长上下文检索中的失败案例或偏差。

limits.en: Computational cost of DeepStack integration not quantified.
limits.zh: 未量化 DeepStack 集成的计算成本。

limits.en: Generalization to unseen video lengths beyond 256K tokens untested.
limits.zh: 未测试对超过 256K token 的视频长度的泛化能力。

limits.en: Comparison with concurrent models may be outdated due to rapid progress.
limits.zh: 与同期模型的比较可能因快速进展而过时。
